summary: Hey David, what a week! You've dropped 4.4 pounds over the past two weeks and you're now at 259.7 lbs—that's 55.3 pounds gone since you started, which is genuinely impressive progress. Your current rate of 2.2 pounds per week is exactly the kind of sustainable loss that sticks around long-term, and that's what we're after. I noticed you logged 9 out of 7 days this period, so you're staying engaged with your data, which matters. Next week, let's aim for consistent logging every single day—it helps you spot patterns with how your body responds to Mounjaro and your activity. You're doing the work, and it's paying off.
